content.text: How can I render a widget's HTML template while ensuring that only specific, pre-approved data fields from an external context are used?
If I provide an 'add_context' dictionary containing keys not in self.accepted_keywords, how does the rendering process handle those unapproved keys?
Any key provided in `add_context` that is not found within `self.accepted_keywords` will be silently ignored and will not update your widget data.
Ah, so only explicitly allowed context can modify the output. That clarifies the security boundary.
